title: Dry Doggie Shampoo - No Rinse, No Hassle - Raspberry Fragrance - 2-in-1 Cleans and Conditions - 200ml Bottle Spray - Pack of 2 - Gentle Formula for Clean, Fresh Dogs Between Baths by Pride & Groom
features: No Rinse, No Hassle: Convenient dry shampoo formula that requires no water, perfect for quick and easy cleaning between baths.
Fresh Raspberry Fragrance: Leaves your dog smelling sweet and fresh with a delightful raspberry scent that lasts.
2-in-1 Cleans and Conditions: Gently cleans while conditioning your dog’s coat, keeping it soft, shiny, and healthy.
Convenient Pack of 2: Comes in a pack of two 200ml spray bottles, ensuring you always have a handy solution for a quick clean-up.
description: Product description Keep your dog looking and smelling their best with our Dry Doggie Shampoo. Featuring a delightful raspberry fragrance, this no-rinse, hassle-free formula cleans and conditions your pet’s coat without the need for water. Each pack includes two 200ml spray bottles, making it easy to keep your furry friend fresh and clean between baths. Our Dry Doggie Shampoo is a lifesaver for pet owners who want to maintain their dog's cleanliness without the fuss of a full bath. Infused with a pleasant raspberry scent, this 2-in-1 formula effectively cleanses and conditions your dog's coat, leaving it soft, shiny, and free of dirt and odors. Ideal for use between baths or when you're short on time, this dry shampoo is gentle enough for daily use. The non-irritating formula is perfect for dogs with sensitive skin and provides a quick and easy solution to keep your dog fresh and clean. Directions Spray directly onto dog's fur, no need for water or rinsing.
